scripts.lint: turbo run lint && echo Lint finished
scripts.typecheck: turbo run typecheck && echo Typecheck finished
scripts.db:generate: turbo run db:generate && echo DB Generate finished
scripts.db:migrate: turbo run db:migrate && echo DB Migrate finished
scripts.db:push: turbo run db:push && echo DB Push finished
scripts.clean: pnpm -r exec rm -rf node_modules .turbo dist dist-types && echo Clean finished
scripts.typecoverage: pnpm dlx type-coverage -at-least=99 && echo Typecoverage finished.
scripts.depcheck: pnpm dlx knip && echo Depcheck finished.
scripts.doctorcheck: pnpm dlx react-doctor@latest . --verbose && echo Doctor finished.
